title: India Condemns Deadly Iranian Strike on Commercial Ship
summary_full: India issued a diplomatic protest after an Indian sailor was killed and dozens more were injured in an Iranian attack on a tanker in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: India issued a diplomatic protest after an Indian sailor was killed and dozens more were injured in an Iranian attack on a tanker in the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: India Condemns Deadly Iranian Strike on Commercial Ship
